## Purpose 
Use new central cluster and climacommon modules

Follows template of SurfaceFluxxes.jl [update](https://github.com/CliMA/SurfaceFluxes.jl/pull/162) and ClimaComms.jl [update](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaComms.jl/pull/69)
title: use new central for buildkite

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
update for most recent dependency updates

note: The dataset used for the temporal map albedo has been updated in ClimaLand v0.10. The previous file had NaNs in high latitudes, and the dataset has been cleaned to replace these with 1. This may not be the best solution, but we figured it would be better than having NaNs

note 2: In the AMIP paperplots, net TOA fluxes look different as of this PR. We believe this is due to ClimaAtmos using ConstantAlbedo, which doesn't get reset with land albedo in the coupler. We've opened an issue to fix this so the atmosphere uses the albedo provided from land: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/issues/653

## To-do
- [x] fix https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/issues/2709 in Atmos
  - not exactly a bug and not introduced in this PR, but would be nice to include fix in Atmos v0.21.0 release :)
- [x] use ClimaAtmos@0.21 instead of ClimaAtmos#main after release is merged into main https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/pull/2694
- [x] check buildkite plots

## Content
updates to:
- ClimaLand v0.10
- ClimaCore v0.12
- CLIMAParameters v0.9
- Thermodynamics 0.12
- ClimaAtmos v0.21

## PRs replaced by this one
- #615 
- #621 
- #622 
- #623
- #640 
- #618 

<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: up dependencies (ClimaAtmos v0.21, ClimaLand v0.10)
